# Unified Chat-First Experience Implementation Plan

> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.

**Goal:** Replace the Dashboard/Chat toggle with a single chat-first view where the system's auto-generated analysis (1 joint chart + key insights) appears as the first assistant message after file upload.

**Architecture:** Remove DashboardView, ViewToggle, and InsightCard components. Modify the LLM dashboard prompt to generate exactly 1 joint chart instead of 3-5 separate charts. The upload response delivers a single chart + insights, which the frontend seeds as the first assistant message in ChatView. The sidebar drops its Dashboard/Chat navigation since there's only one view now.

**Tech Stack:** Python/FastAPI (backend), React/TypeScript (frontend), DeepSeek LLM, ECharts

---

## File Map

| Action | File | Responsibility |
|--------|------|----------------|
| Modify | `server/llm/prompts.py` | Change dashboard prompt: 1 joint chart instead of 3-5 |
| Modify | `server/models/domain.py` | `DashboardSuggestion.plans` -> `.plan` (singular) |
| Modify | `server/llm/client.py` | Parse single-plan response |
| Modify | `server/models/api.py` | `UploadResponse.charts` -> `.chart` (singular, nullable) |
| Modify | `server/main.py` | Upload + add-files endpoints return single chart |
| Modify | `client/src/types.ts` | Mirror backend type changes |
| Modify | `client/src/components/session/SessionScreen.tsx` | Remove view toggle, always show ChatView, seed initial message |
| Modify | `client/src/components/session/ChatView.tsx` | No structural changes needed |
| Modify | `client/src/components/shared/ChatMessage.tsx` | Support multi-line insight text rendering |
| Modify | `client/src/styles/index.css` | Remove dashboard/insight/nav CSS |
| Delete | `client/src/components/session/DashboardView.tsx` | No longer needed |
| Delete | `client/src/components/session/ViewToggle.tsx` | No longer needed |
| Delete | `client/src/components/shared/InsightCard.tsx` | No longer needed |
